name: Individual.addComment
use_when: Appends a comment — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.addEncounter
use_when: Appends an encounter — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.addEnrolment
use_when: Appends a program enrolment — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.addGroup
use_when: Appends a group — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.addGroupSubject
use_when: Appends a group subject — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.addRelationship
use_when: Appends a relationship — internal mutation, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.address
use_when: Returns address label and lowest administrative level name for display.

name: Individual.approvalStatuses
use_when: Returns approval status entities for the individual.

name: Individual.associateChild
use_when: Associates enrolments, encounters, comments, or approvals to individual — framework plumbing.

name: Individual.associateChildToMultipleParents
use_when: Associates group subjects to multiple parents — framework plumbing.

name: Individual.associateGroupSubject
use_when: Associates group subject to group and member subjects — framework plumbing.

name: Individual.associateRelationship
use_when: Associates relationship to individual — framework plumbing.

name: Individual.chronologicalEnrolments
use_when: Returns enrolments sorted by encounter date in ascending order.

name: Individual.cloneForEdit
use_when: Creates a shallow copy with all properties for edit workflows.

name: Individual.cloneForReference
use_when: Creates a shallow copy with demographic data for reference purposes.

name: Individual.comments
use_when: Returns comment entities for the individual.

name: Individual.createEmptyInstance
use_when: Instantiates new individual with default values and empty collections.

name: Individual.createEmptySubjectInstance
use_when: Instantiates new subject with default values, excluding gender.

name: Individual.createdBy
use_when: Returns user who created the individual entity.

name: Individual.createdByUUID
use_when: Returns UUID of user who created the individual entity.

name: Individual.dateOfBirth
use_when: Returns the individual's date of birth to calculate age or check enrollment eligibility.

name: Individual.dateOfBirthVerified
use_when: Returns whether the date of birth is verified for data quality validation rules.

name: Individual.detail1
use_when: Returns formatted age display for individuals in summary or visit context.

name: Individual.detail2
use_when: Returns formatted gender display for individuals in summary or visit context.

name: Individual.encounters
use_when: Returns all encounters to query past visit history in validation or eligibility rules.

name: Individual.enrolments
use_when: Returns all program enrolments to check enrollment status or history.

name: Individual.everScheduledEncounters
use_when: Returns scheduled, non-cancelled encounters for visit schedule or eligibility checks.

name: Individual.everScheduledEncountersOfType
use_when: All encounters of the given type ever scheduled for this subject (including completed and cancelled).

name: Individual.findEnrolment
use_when: Returns a specific enrolment by UUID to access enrollment-specific observations.

name: Individual.findGroupedObservation
use_when: Returns child observations within a grouped (multi-select) concept for validation.

name: Individual.findLastEncounterOfType
use_when: Returns the most recent encounter of specified types to access previous visit data.

name: Individual.findLatestObservationFromEncounters
use_when: Returns the most recent observation value across all encounters before current one.

name: Individual.findLatestObservationFromPreviousEncounters
use_when: Read the latest observed value of a concept across encounters that occurred BEFORE `currentEncounter`. Look-back / trend rules.

name: Individual.findMediaObservations
use_when: Returns all media-type observations for display or attachment validation rules.

name: Individual.findNthLastEncounterOfType
use_when: Returns the nth previous encounter of specified types for historical trend analysis.

name: Individual.findObservation
use_when: Returns a specific observation from current or grouped observations for validation.

name: Individual.findObservationAcrossAllEnrolments
use_when: Returns an enrolment containing a specific observation across all programs.

name: Individual.findObservationInLastEncounter
use_when: Returns an observation value from the most recent encounter of same type.

name: Individual.firstActiveOrRecentEnrolment
use_when: Returns the active or most recent enrollment for determining current program context.

name: Individual.firstName
use_when: Returns the individual's first name for display or name-based validation rules.

name: Individual.fromResource
use_when: Deserializes API response into Individual object — internal persistence, not called from rules.

name: Individual.fullAddress
use_when: Returns formatted hierarchical address for display in visit or summary context.

name: Individual.gender
use_when: Returns the individual's gender entity for eligibility and validation rules.

name: Individual.getAddressLevelDummyUUID
use_when: Internal utility — returns constant placeholder UUID for address level operations.

name: Individual.getAgeAndDateOfBirthDisplay
use_when: Returns formatted age and birth date string for summary or display in visit rules.

name: Individual.getAllScheduledVisits
use_when: Returns list of upcoming scheduled encounters excluding current one for visit scheduling rules.

name: Individual.getEncounters
use_when: Subject's encounters. Pass `true` to include voided/cancelled.

name: Individual.getEntityTypeName
use_when: Returns the subject type name for entity identification in eligibility and validation contexts.

name: Individual.getFullName
use_when: Returns complete formatted name from first, middle, and last name components.

name: Individual.getGroupSubjects
use_when: Returns non-voided group subjects for household or group eligibility rules.

name: Individual.getGroups
use_when: Returns non-voided groups for group membership eligibility checks.

name: Individual.getHeadOfHouseholdGroupSubject
use_when: Returns head-of-household group relationship for household-level eligibility rules.

name: Individual.getMemberEntitiesWithLatestStatus
use_when: Returns descendants (individual, encounters, enrolments) matching approval status for audit rules.

name: Individual.getMobileNo
use_when: Returns mobile number from observations — internal search, rarely called from rules.

name: Individual.getMobileNumber
use_when: Returns formatted mobile number observation value for contact eligibility rules.

name: Individual.getName
use_when: Returns 'Registration' entity type identifier — internal framework constant.

name: Individual.getObservationReadableValue
use_when: Returns human-readable observation value by concept name for validation and summary rules.

name: Individual.getObservationValue
use_when: Returns raw observation value by concept name for eligibility and validation logic.

name: Individual.getPlaceholderAddressLevel
use_when: Internal — creates dummy address level entity for placeholder operations.

name: Individual.getPreviousEnrolment
use_when: Returns prior enrolment in same program for eligibility and visit schedule rules.

name: Individual.getProfilePicture
use_when: Returns profile picture data — internal serialization, not called from rules.

name: Individual.getRelationships
use_when: Returns non-voided relationships for family or relative eligibility checks.

name: Individual.getRelative
use_when: Returns first relative by relationship type for household or family validation rules.

name: Individual.getRelatives
use_when: Filter relatives by relationship type, optionally inverting the direction of the relation lookup.

name: Individual.getSchemaName
use_when: Internal utility — returns schema identifier for database mapping.

name: Individual.getTranslatedNameString
use_when: Retrieve localized display name, handling persons, users, and group types distinctly.

name: Individual.groupSubjects
use_when: Retrieve group members as a list — internal entity accessor for household or group composition.

name: Individual.groups
use_when: Retrieve group membership list — internal entity accessor for group relationships.

name: Individual.hasActiveEnrolment
use_when: Returns true when at least one non-voided enrolment is currently active.

name: Individual.hasEncounterOfType
use_when: True when at least one encounter of any of the given types exists.

name: Individual.hasEnrolments
use_when: Returns count of non-voided enrolments; eligibility rules check active program participation.

name: Individual.hasProgramEncounterOfType
use_when: True when at least one program-encounter of the given type exists.

name: Individual.individual
use_when: Internal accessor — returns self reference for polymorphic entity handling.

name: Individual.initLowestAddressLevel
use_when: Internal utility — initializes default address level for users or subject types.

name: Individual.isFemale
use_when: Returns true when gender is female — validation and eligibility rules check sex-based criteria.

name: Individual.isGender
use_when: Returns true when gender matches the given parameter — rules filter by specific gender.

name: Individual.isGroup
use_when: Returns true when subject type is a group — routing logic differentiates group vs. person workflows.

name: Individual.isHousehold
use_when: Returns true when subject type is a household — eligibility rules check household-level criteria.

name: Individual.isMale
use_when: Returns true when gender is male — validation and eligibility rules check sex-based criteria.

name: Individual.isPerson
use_when: Returns true when subject type is person or nil — rules conditionally apply person-specific logic.

name: Individual.isRegistrationBeforeDateOfBirth
use_when: Returns true when registration date precedes birth date — validation rules flag temporal inconsistencies.

name: Individual.isRejectedEntity
use_when: Returns true when latest approval status is rejected — eligibility rules exclude rejected registrations.

name: Individual.isUniqueName
use_when: Returns true when subject type enforces name uniqueness — validation rules require unique identifiers.

name: Individual.lastModifiedBy
use_when: Internal accessor — returns user who last modified the entity for audit trails.

name: Individual.lastModifiedByUUID
use_when: Internal accessor — returns UUID of user who last modified the entity for audit tracking.

name: Individual.lastName
use_when: Use in display or eligibility rules when validating individual's surname.

name: Individual.latestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Check approval status in eligibility rules when subject's data requires administrative approval.

name: Individual.lowestAddressLevel
use_when: Use in eligibility or summary rules to filter individuals by their most granular address location.

name: Individual.lowestTwoLevelAddress
use_when: Format and display the two deepest address hierarchy levels in visit summaries or eligibility checks.

name: Individual.middleName
use_when: Use in display or validation rules when checking individual's complete name components.

name: Individual.name
use_when: Use in any rule context requiring the individual's primary name field for display or filtering.

name: Individual.nameString
use_when: Display formatted full name or user identifier in schedules, summaries, or eligibility rule outputs.

name: Individual.nameStringWithUniqueAttribute
use_when: Display individual name with mobile number for Farmer subjects in summaries or eligibility contexts.

name: Individual.nonVoidedEncounters
use_when: Filter active encounters in summary or eligibility rules excluding cancelled or voided records.

name: Individual.nonVoidedEnrolments
use_when: Retrieve active program enrollments in eligibility or summary rules excluding voided registrations.

name: Individual.observationExistsAcrossAllEnrolments
use_when: Check if a concept observation exists in any active enrollment for validation or eligibility decisions.

name: Individual.observations
use_when: Access individual's baseline observations in eligibility, validation, or summary rules.

name: Individual.profilePicture
use_when: Use in display or summary rules when showing individual's photo alongside registration or eligibility data.

name: Individual.registrationDate
use_when: Use in eligibility rules to determine age-of-registration or time-based inclusion criteria.

name: Individual.registrationLocation
use_when: Use in geolocation-based eligibility rules filtering individuals by registration coordinates.

name: Individual.relationships
use_when: Access household or family links in eligibility rules checking relations to other individuals.

name: Individual.replaceMediaObservation
use_when: Internal mutation replacing file/media observation — rarely called directly from rules.

name: Individual.replaceObservation
use_when: Internal mutation updating observation values — rarely called directly from rules.

name: Individual.scheduledEncounters
use_when: Retrieve upcoming unexecuted encounters in visit schedule rules for appointment management.

name: Individual.scheduledEncountersOfType
use_when: Filter scheduled encounters by type in visit schedule rules to manage specific appointment workflows.

name: Individual.setAge
use_when: Eligibility or registration rule needs to set age in years or months, updating dateOfBirth retroactively.

name: Individual.setDateOfBirth
use_when: Registration validation rule explicitly sets verified date of birth from a provided date value.

name: Individual.setFirstName
use_when: Internal mutation — registration form submission updates first name and composite name field.

name: Individual.setLastName
use_when: Internal mutation — registration form submission updates last name and composite name field.

name: Individual.setLatestEntityApprovalStatus
use_when: Internal mutation — framework updates approval status during entity lifecycle transitions.

name: Individual.setMiddleName
use_when: Internal mutation — registration form submission updates middle name and composite name field.

name: Individual.staticallyEligiblePrograms
use_when: Eligibility rule filters programs to return those not already enrolled with allowMultipleEnrolments disabled.

name: Individual.subjectLocation
use_when: Summary or validation rule reads the subject's registered location as a SubjectLocation entity.

name: Individual.subjectType
use_when: Validation or eligibility rule accesses subject type configuration to determine allowed fields or enrolment rules.

name: Individual.subjectTypeName
use_when: Summary or display rule returns subject type name string for UI rendering.

name: Individual.toJSON
use_when: Internal serialization — framework converts subject to JSON for API response or data transport.

name: Individual.toResource
use_when: Internal serialization — framework converts subject to server resource format with formatted dates and UUIDs.

name: Individual.toSummaryString
use_when: Summary rule returns formatted string with name, age, and gender for dashboard or list display.

name: Individual.updateAudit
use_when: Internal mutation — framework updates audit fields (createdBy, lastModifiedBy, timestamps) on registration.

name: Individual.updateProfilePicture
use_when: Internal mutation — registration or profile update form changes the profile picture value.

name: Individual.userProfileSubtext1
use_when: Summary rule returns gender name for persons, empty string for non-person subject types.

name: Individual.userProfileSubtext2
use_when: Summary rule returns formatted display age for persons, empty string for non-person subject types.

name: Individual.validate
use_when: Registration rule runs all subject type-specific validations on address, dates, names, gender.

name: Individual.validateAddress
use_when: Registration validation rule checks lowest address level is populated when required by subject type.

name: Individual.validateDateOfBirth
use_when: Registration validation rule checks date of birth is valid, not future, not >120 years, after registration date.

name: Individual.validateFirstName
use_when: Validates that firstName matches configured format rules during registration.

name: Individual.validateGender
use_when: Validates that gender is selected and not empty during registration.

name: Individual.validateLastName
use_when: Validates that lastName matches configured format and mandatory requirements.

name: Individual.validateMiddleName
use_when: Validates that middleName matches configured format if provided.

name: Individual.validateName
use_when: Internal validation helper—checks name field emptiness, format compliance, and mandatory requirements.

name: Individual.validateRegistrationDate
use_when: Validates registration date is present, valid, after birth, and not in future.

name: Individual.validateRegistrationLocation
use_when: Validates that registration location is assigned and not null.
